allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', d.get\('peerDependencies', {}\)\); print\('deps with worklets:', {k:v for k,v in d.get\('dependencies', {}\).items\(\) if 'worklet' in k.lower\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:',p.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:',JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies||{},null,2\)\); console.log\('deps:',JSON.stringify\(p.dependencies||{},null,2\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies||{},null,2\)\); console.log\('peerMeta:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependenciesMeta||{},null,2\)\); console.log\('optionalDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.optionalDependencies||{},null,2\)\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:',p.version\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies||{},null,2\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('nativewind version:',p.version\); console.log\('deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.dependencies||{},null,2\)\);}\)")
